global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, abstract shapes, and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with CoinBridge.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, rendered in a soft blue color, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Confidence message
elements.description: A prominent text block that reads 'Save with confidence Built for peace of mind' in a clear, legible font, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: CoinBridge title
elements.description: The title 'CoinBridge' displayed in a bold font at the top of the ad, contrasting against the background.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button that says 'Start now' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, CoinBridge logo, confidence message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, abstract shapes are centered, and the body text and CTA are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, Built for peace of mind, CoinBridge, Start now
